recommendations.title: Scale the checkout consumer for the ecommerce-events topic
recommendations.description: Consumer lag reached 125000 and is creating downstream payment and order-service pressure.
recommendations.action: Increase consumer parallelism and validate partitioning for the ecommerce-events topic.

recommendations.title: Redact and rate-limit authentication logs for user-service
recommendations.description: Repeated unauthorized access patterns and credential-like content require immediate containment.
recommendations.action: Apply redaction and tighten authentication monitoring around user-service.
